payload.text: Run the optimization-sweep skill end to end against the configured Google Ads account. Load pancake_account_foundations + pancake_orchestrator first, route to the right inspect/evaluate/diagnose skills, and ship every reversible fix. Budget-raise asks: create_task assigned to the co-founder with rationale and projected impact — never raise budget unilaterally. If nothing material has changed since yesterday's sweep and no actions are warranted, reply with NO_REPLY after logging the reason.

Run the daily-digest skill. Compile the last 24h of activity into the 3-section digest, then create_task assigned to the co-founder titled 'Relay Google Ads digest — <date>' with the digest text as the brief. The co-founder picks the channel and delivers. Do not post to Slack or any external surface yourself. If literally nothing happened in the last 24h, reply with NO_REPLY after logging the reason.
